source.title: CPIC Guideline for Pharmacogenetics-Guided Warfarin Dosing
source.finding: VKORC1 -1639G>A: AA genotype requires ~50% lower warfarin dose.

AA.effect: Requires ~50% lower warfarin dose. High bleeding risk at standard doses.
AA.recommendation: Start warfarin at significantly reduced dose. Use pharmacogenomic dosing algorithm.

AG.recommendation: Reduce initial warfarin dose. Monitor INR closely.

GG.recommendation: Standard warfarin dosing with routine INR monitoring.
